calendar.matters:
ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Feb-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
COURT CALL APPEARANCES:
Matthew R. Eason, Esq. of EASON & TAMBORNINI 916-927-3976, for petitioner Settlement Funding, LLC moving for approval of transfer of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Carmen Santiago, co-petitioner in propria persona, was in the courtroom but did not appear on the record

RULING:
Parties submitted to the Court's ruling: PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights by Carmen Santiago (Payee) to Settlement Funding LLC or its assignee -- Granted. Mr. Eason is to prepare an order. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
